customers_say: Customers find this water purifier to be a best-in-class product that's easy to install, with good taste and value for money. However, the reliability receives mixed feedback - while some say it does the job well, others report it stopped working. Moreover, durability and leakage are significant concerns, with customers reporting damage within three months and water leakage issues.

reviews.author: Saheli
reviews.title: Quality of water and product services
reviews.body: Excellent product as of now. I have previously used the KENT RO , EXCELELNT TASTE

reviews.author: Priya Tandon
reviews.title: Good product
reviews.body: Good product , no malfunctioning observed till now

reviews.author: priyanka
reviews.title: Don’t buy , waste of money, in 3 months the product is not working
reviews.body: I have purchased this in feb 2026 , in 3 months membrane gone , outlet water is not controlled , taking 50 litres for 9 litres filtration. Service is very pathetic, even after they told 4 year warranty they don’t give you any service on product parts. I have been following up on service for 2 weeks now the regional SMO is just giving dates but no work done. Service and product is utter waste on Kent , I do not recommend to buy this product.

reviews.author: Placeholder
reviews.title: Perfect RO for homes
reviews.body: Bought a Kent RO recently ,quality feels really nice and the service team was fast and helpful. Water tastes clean and fresh, and not too soft as my old RO (so if you liked that extra “soft” feel, this one is a bit different). Overall happy with the product and service. Would recommend if you want reliable purification and good after-sales support
